data.rationale: Export to Salesforce in the US for EU consumers is allowed only with approval and anonymization controls.

matched_instructions.title: Require controls before customer export
matched_instructions.description: Customer exports require approval and anonymization when sent to approved external systems.

obligations: Record destination system, jurisdiction, consumer jurisdiction, and decision_id.

agent_action.message: Create an approval task and anonymize direct identifiers before exporting.
